description: The Republic of Ireland's Health Service Executive (HSE) has approved atezolizumab for reimbursement as a monotherapy treatment option for the treatment of adult patients with locally advanced or metastatic non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) after prior chemotherapy. The regimen further states that patients with EGFR mutations or an ALK fusion oncogene are required to have received prior tyrosine kinase inhibitor therapy.

contributions.description: Adding HSE approvals for reimbursement to database

contributor.name: Van Allen lab
